observations.summary: The act of gathering and hoarding leads to a physical and emotional crushing, symbolizing how accumulation can suffocate and silence.

left_evidence.quote: He gathered until his form was distended and crushed—a silent column in a barren field, the accumulated density squeezing the breath from his lungs.

right_evidence.quote: His hands locked in the posture of hoarding. The suffocating mass silenced him.
